# Gitlab Tools

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî GitLab managerial dashboards.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `gitlab_dashboard` | Managerial GitLab dashboards: project summary, per-assignee workload, overdue, stale, milestones, time tracking and creation/closure trend. | `gitlab:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `gitlab_manage` | Create, update or comment on GitLab issues. Supports batch create (issues[]) and batch update (updates[]). Human approval required for all operations. | `gitlab:write` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |
| `gitlab_read` | Read GitLab projects, issues, users, branches, commits, milestones and merge requests. No human approval required. | `gitlab:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "url": "",
  "token": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "default_per_page": 20,
  "proxy": "",
  "timeout": 30,
  "token": "",
  "url": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `default_per_page` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `20` | Default page size for paginated requests (default: 20). |
| `proxy` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `token` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | Personal Access Token (PAT).  Needs 'read_api' scope for gitlab_read and 'api' scope for gitlab_manage. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | Base URL of the GitLab instance, e.g. 'https://gitlab.com' or 'https://git.yourcompany.com'.  Must NOT include /api/v4. |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `true` | Verify TLS certificate of the GitLab server (default: true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__DEFAULT_PER_PAGE` | `default_per_page` | `integer` | `20` | ‚Äî | Default page size for paginated requests (default: 20). |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__PROXY` | `proxy` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | ‚Äî | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Personal Access Token (PAT).  Needs 'read_api' scope for gitlab_read and 'api' scope for gitlab_manage. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Base URL of the GitLab instance, e.g. 'https://gitlab.com' or 'https://git.yourcompany.com'.  Must NOT include /api/v4. |
| `TOOL_GITLAB__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | ‚Äî | Verify TLS certificate of the GitLab server (default: true). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` ‚Äî useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `gitlab_manage`

- **`add_comment`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [update_issue, add_comment, close_issue] Issue IID (internal to project). |
  | `body` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add_comment] Comment body (Markdown supported). |

- **`close_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [update_issue, add_comment, close_issue] Issue IID (internal to project). |

- **`create_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `title` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Issue title. Required for create_issue when 'issues' array is not used; optional for update_issue. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Issue description (Markdown supported). |
  | `assignee_usernames` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] GitLab usernames to assign the issue to. On update_issue this REPLACES the current assignees. Pass an empty array to remove all assignees. User IDs are resolved automatically. |
  | `labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Label names. On update_issue this REPLACES all current labels (use 'add_labels'/'remove_labels' for incremental changes). Pass an empty array to clear all labels. |
  | `milestone_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Milestone ID. Pass 0 on update_issue to remove the milestone. |
  | `due_date` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Pass empty string on update_issue to clear. |
  | `issues` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue] Create multiple issues at once. When provided, top-level title/description/etc. are ignored. Each element follows the same fields as a single create_issue. |

- **`update_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [update_issue, add_comment, close_issue] Issue IID (internal to project). |
  | `title` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Issue title. Required for create_issue when 'issues' array is not used; optional for update_issue. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Issue description (Markdown supported). |
  | `assignee_usernames` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] GitLab usernames to assign the issue to. On update_issue this REPLACES the current assignees. Pass an empty array to remove all assignees. User IDs are resolved automatically. |
  | `labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Label names. On update_issue this REPLACES all current labels (use 'add_labels'/'remove_labels' for incremental changes). Pass an empty array to clear all labels. |
  | `milestone_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Milestone ID. Pass 0 on update_issue to remove the milestone. |
  | `due_date` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_issue, update_issue] Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Pass empty string on update_issue to clear. |
  | `add_labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [update_issue] Labels to ADD without affecting existing labels. Mutually exclusive with 'labels' (which replaces). |
  | `remove_labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [update_issue] Labels to REMOVE without affecting other labels. |
  | `state_event` | `string` | ‚Äî | [update_issue] State transition to apply. |
  | `confidential` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [update_issue] Mark issue as confidential (true) or public (false). |
  | `updates` | `array` | ‚Äî | [update_issue] Update multiple issues at once. When provided, top-level title/description/etc. are ignored. Each element must include 'issue_iid' plus the fields to change. |


### `gitlab_read`

- **`get_issue`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [get_issue, list_issue_notes] Issue IID (internal to project). |

- **`get_project`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | ‚Äî | GSageToolConfig profile to use.  Omit to use the 'default' profile (most common).  Useful when the org has multiple GitLab instances configured. |
  | `project` | `string` | ‚Äî | [Most actions] Project identifier: numeric ID (e.g. '42') or namespace/path (e.g. 'mygroup/myrepo'). |
  | `user_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [get_user] GitLab user ID. |
  | `issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [get_issue, list_issue_notes] Issue IID (internal to project). |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Maximum number of items to return (hard cap 500). Default: 20. |
  | `search` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_projects, list_users, list_branches, list_labels, list_milestones, list_project_members] Free-text search string. |
  | `visibility` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_projects] Filter by visibility. |
  | `membership` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [list_projects] When true, list only projects where the token owner is a member. |
  | `archived` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [list_projects] Include/exclude archived projects. |
  | `state` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests, list_milestones] Filter by state. |
  | `labels` | `array` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests] Filter by label names (all labels must match ‚Äî AND semantics). |
  | `assignee` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests] Filter by assignee username (e.g. 'joao.silva').  Use the GitLab username, not the display name. |
  | `author` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests] Filter by author username. |
  | `milestone` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests] Filter by milestone title. Use '%23upcoming' for the next open milestone or '%23started' for started milestones. |
  | `due_before` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues] Issues due before this date (ISO 8601, e.g. '2026-05-31'). |
  | `due_after` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues] Issues due after this date (ISO 8601). |
  | `scope` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues] Scope of issues to return. |
  | `issue_search` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues] Full-text search in issue title and description. |
  | `sort` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues, list_merge_requests] Sort direction. |
  | `order_by` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_issues] Order by field: created_at, updated_at, priority, due_date, relative_position, label_priority, milestone_due, popularity, weight. |
  | `ref` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_commits] Branch, tag or commit SHA to list commits for (defaults to project default branch). |
  | `since` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_commits] Only commits after this datetime (ISO 8601, e.g. '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z'). |
  | `until` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_commits] Only commits before this datetime (ISO 8601). |
  | `referenced_issue_iid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [list_commits] When set, only return commits whose message contains a reference to issue #<iid>  (e.g. 'Closes #42', 'Refs #42').  Filtered client-side after fetching. |

## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `gitlab_dashboard` | `gitlab:read` |
| `gitlab_manage` | `gitlab:write` |
| `gitlab_read` | `gitlab:read` |
